title: phaseolus pedicellatus var. pedicellatus
intro: Phaseolus pedicellatus var. pedicellatus, also known as the kidney bean or adzuki bean, is a variety of bean native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which have been shown to help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of consuming Phaseolus pedicellatus var. pedicellatus include improved cardiovascular health, reduced risk of chronic diseases such as diabetes and certain types of cancer, and enhanced digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, soups, and other infusions, as well as in dried or powdered form as a dietary supplement.
